nasb.text: Your dwelling is in the midst of deceit; Through deceit they refuse to know Me,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Heaping oppression upon oppression, and deceit upon deceit, they refuse to know me, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 欺凌加上欺凌，詭詐加上詭詐， 他們不肯認識我。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 他们充满诡诈， 不认我是上帝。 这是耶和华说的。”
